title: psychotria kirkii var. swynnertonii
intro: Psychotria kirkii var. swynnertonii is a variant of the Psychotria kirkii plant, also known as the "Madagascar King of Herbs" or "Ravensare," which is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimalarial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Psychotria kirkii var. swynnertonii include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of malaria, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and anti-inflammatory agent, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, often combined with other herbs, to utilize its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
